original_image_tags: A single, off-white, aged document page with two punch holes at the top. The paper is creased and shows faint, reversed text from the other side bleeding through, making the primary text difficult to read. A prominent vertical stamp is on the left side.

elements.description: A faded, blank or reverse side of a page with significant bleed-through of typed text from the other side. It features two black punch holes at the top, a blue stamp on the left side reading 'RECD-CORR & TOURS APR 3 12 47 PM 1974', a faint red stamp at the bottom left reading 'APR 3 74', and a faint pencil notation in the center.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the page having two punch holes, a prominent stamp on the left, and significant bleed-through, but Description B adds specific text for the stamps which A does not contradict as it does not quote them.
